spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1175 My take is it's Mosa's df and he/she is in the Heaven Realm. I personally hope Mosa is a valkyrie with that fruit. Valkyries are sometimes depicted to ride horses with wings or have wing
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1175 My take is it's Mosa's df and he/she is in the Heaven Realm. I personally hope Mosa is a valkyrie with that fruit. Valkyries are sometimes depicted to ride horses with wings or have wings themselves. I think Mosa will fly down at the end nitter.net/i/status/2003858959229… WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1175 The Yggdrasil Structure in Elbaf - Shanks Swords True Power Oda is clearly drawing from Norse mythology, specifically the world tree Yggdrasil. In mythology, three key beings occupy the tree: Nidhogg – At the roots (Underworld) Ratatoskr – The messenger along the trunk Hræsvelgr – The giant eagle at the top (Heaven) Now in Elbaf we seemingly have: Underworld → Loki with Nidhogg powers Sun World → Ratatoskr’s soul in Ragnir Heaven World → ??? (missing piece) Two of the three mythological beings are already present in some form. Which makes the absence of Hræsvelgr… suspicious. — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2026409724812603681#m

misc.title: The Loki vs Shanks Parallel(And Shanks role connected to Hraesvelgr). If Loki = Nidhogg (roots, chaos, lightning) And Shanks wields Hræsvelgr (sky, wind, heaven) Then their clash becomes myth reenactm
misc.text: The Loki vs Shanks Parallel(And Shanks role connected to Hraesvelgr). If Loki = Nidhogg (roots, chaos, lightning) And Shanks wields Hræsvelgr (sky, wind, heaven) Then their clash becomes myth reenactment: Dragon of the roots vs Eagle of the heavens And what happened? Shanks didn’t kill Loki. He subdued him. In mythology, Hræsvelgr doesn’t descend to destroy Nidhogg. He remains above. We don´t know what happend between Loki and Shanks but the fact how much the giants respect Shanks, how Loki was stopped in the end, make it possible that Shanks represent Hraesvelgr, rivalling Loki powers. It make sense given for what Shanks also stand: - He intervenes only when balance collapses. - He has access to the highest authorities. - He is respected by giants. He stands above chaos rather than indulging in it. Hræsvelgr represents: The power at the top of the world tree. Shanks acts exactly like that in the world balance. He literally fits well to it, im pretty sure his sword has Hræsvelgr as power source. And it would be a huge power given Shanks haki is itself pretty broken. It could also explain how WIfi worked out, via wind manipulation+haki... I think Shanks generally possesses the power of Hræsvelgr within his sword. In short, it would also fit very well with Shanks' character and his importance to Elbaph and especially One Piece. We got Nidhogg and Ratatoskr, so the chance of a Hræsvelgr Zoan power is 99% certain in my opinion. And no one fits Hræsvelgr better than Shanks. What do you think of this theory?

misc.title: The Sword Theory – Gryphon as Hræsvelgr Shanks’ sword is named Gryphon. A gryphon is: - Half eagle - Royal guardian creature - Symbol of sovereignty That is already eagle symbolism. Now consider: - Sh
misc.text: The Sword Theory – Gryphon as Hræsvelgr Shanks’ sword is named Gryphon. A gryphon is: - Half eagle - Royal guardian creature - Symbol of sovereignty That is already eagle symbolism. Now consider: - Shamrock wields a weapon tied to Cerberus. - Ratatoskr’s soul inhabits Ragnir. - Zoans have wills. Objects can possess powers. It becomes very plausible that: Gryphon is not just a sword. It could be: A Mythical Zoan weapon – Model: Hræsvelgr OR A weapon housing the soul of Hræsvelgr. That would parallel Ratatoskr perfectly. If Nidhogg = Lightning destruction If Ratatoskr = Ice guardian Then Hræsvelgr logically controls: - Wind - Storm currents - Atmospheric pressure Weather manipulation That could be Shank's sword power, rivaling Nidhogg lightning or Ratatoskr Ice powers...

misc.title: Hræsvelgr – The Missing Crown In mythology, Hræsvelgr: - Sits at the very top of Yggdrasil - Is a massive eagle - Creates wind by flapping his wings Represents the sky, storm, and higher perspective -
misc.text: Hræsvelgr – The Missing Crown In mythology, Hræsvelgr: - Sits at the very top of Yggdrasil - Is a massive eagle - Creates wind by flapping his wings Represents the sky, storm, and higher perspective - He is not chaotic like Nidhogg. - He is above(Heaven world) - He is untouchable. He represents: - Heaven - Authority - Oversight Natural balance through overwhelming force And importantly: He is the direct opposite of Nidhogg.

misc.title: Ratatoskr – The Guardian Messenger Ratatoskr in myth: - Runs between eagle and dragon - Carries insults/messages - Maintains tension between top and bottom Context form the Chapter: - Ratatoskr’s soul
misc.text: Ratatoskr – The Guardian Messenger Ratatoskr in myth: - Runs between eagle and dragon - Carries insults/messages - Maintains tension between top and bottom Context form the Chapter: - Ratatoskr’s soul fused in Ragnir. - It safeguarded the Nidhogg fruit. - It waited for a “worthy successor.” That elevates Ratatoskr from messenger to guardian of balance. This establishes a new One Piece rule: Souls can persist within weapons voluntarily. That is huge.

misc.title: Nidhogg – Chaos and Destruction Nidhogg represents: - Decay - Destruction - The erosion of the world - The power at the roots If Loki carries the Nidhogg fruit, then he embodies: - Lightning (destruct
misc.text: Nidhogg – Chaos and Destruction Nidhogg represents: - Decay - Destruction - The erosion of the world - The power at the roots If Loki carries the Nidhogg fruit, then he embodies: - Lightning (destructive force) - Underworld authority - Chaos after Harald’s death Mythologically, Nidhogg gnaws at Yggdrasil’s roots, destabilizing existence itself.

misc.title: Hoy se cumplen 7 años desde que @mangaplus_o comenzó a publicar contenido en español. ¿Qué opináis de la aplicación, creéis que ha mejorado con el tiempo? Pese a que se han mejorado algunas cosas, cre
misc.text: Hoy se cumplen 7 años desde que @mangaplus_o comenzó a publicar contenido en español. ¿Qué opináis de la aplicación, creéis que ha mejorado con el tiempo? Pese a que se han mejorado algunas cosas, creo que aún está lejos de lo que prometieron y con poco material en español 🫤🫤🫤 Sergio (redon) (@Mugiwara_23) ¡¡Ya está disponible la versión 1.1.1 de la App MANGA Plus con el primer contenido en castellano, One Piece incluido!! ¿Estarán @Ivrea y @NormaEdManga colaborando en esta App? — https://nitter.net/Mugiwara_23/status/1099769831585443840#m
